post.summary: Reload the graph sidecar from PG.
Promote a source to a higher clearance level for federation.
Call an MCP tool by name.
Merge multiple nodes into a target.
Resolve a name to a node.

get.summary: Get the neighborhood of a node.
Get the provenance chain for a node.

delete.summary: Delete a source and its chunks.

AuditLogResponse.description: Response for an audit log entry.

mime.description:
MIME type of the content (e.g. "text/markdown", "text/plain").
Defaults to "text/plain" if omitted.

source_type.description:
Source type (document, web_page, conversation, code, api, manual,
tool_output, observation).

uri.description: Optional URI of the original material.

id.description: ID of the created (or deduplicated) source.

McpContent.description: A single content block in an MCP result.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the tool's input parameters.

McpToolCall.description: Request to call an MCP tool.

name.description: Name of the tool to invoke.

McpToolResult.description: Result from an MCP tool call.

is_error.description: Whether the tool call resulted in an error.

source_ids.description: IDs of source nodes to merge from.

target_id.description: ID of the target node to merge into.

audit_log_id.description: Audit log entry ID for the merge operation.

strategy.description:
Search strategy (balanced, precise, exploratory, recent,
graph_first).

node_ids.description: IDs of the newly created nodes.

edge_ids.description: Edge IDs to reassign to this new node.
